name: Pacific North West Capital Corp.
description: Pacific North West Capital Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the discovery and advancement of green metal projects in North America. The company operates through two primary divisions: a Platinum Group Element (PGE) division and a Lithium/Rare Element division. Its flagship asset is the River Valley PGM project, located in the Sudbury region of Ontario, which is recognized as one of Canada's largest primary Platinum Group Metals deposits. The company is dedicated to exploring and developing critical minerals essential for the transition to a sustainable, low-carbon economy.
